Discuss the structure of various business environments and analyse its elements to identify impacts of information systems on those environments.
Compare different information system development methodologies, analyse them in a particular business case context and identify an appropriate methodology.
Discuss and identify various analysis strategies to discover requirements in changing business environments.
Apply analysis and modelling techniques to undertake problem identification, formulate, gather and establish requirements by investigating given business case scenarios.
Compile potential requirements into written requirements and verify requirements completeness.
To develop a harmonious association or relationship among the groups, perform group research, present oral presentation and produce written report.
